mapper.insert: insert into assistant_sessions ( user_id, title, status, current_model_connection_id, current_model_id, current_instruction_profile_id, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{currentModelConnectionId}, #{currentModelId}, #{currentInstructionProfileId}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, status, current_model_connection_id, current_model_id, current_instruction_profile_id, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at from assistant_sessions where user_id = #{userId} and status <> 'DELETED' order by last_message_at desc nulls last, id desc

select id, user_id, title, status, current_model_connection_id, current_model_id, current_instruction_profile_id, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at from assistant_sessions where id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId} and status <> 'DELETED'
mapper.update: update assistant_sessions set current_instruction_profile_id=null, updated_at=current_timestamp where user_id=#{userId} and current_instruction_profile_id=#{instructionProfileId} and status <> 'DELETED'
